PARAM.description: x must be strictly less than y[0]
PARAM.name: x
PARAM.content:
h(x) = y[0] for all x < x[1]
        y[1] for x[1] ≤ x < x[2]
        ...
        y[y.length - 1] for x ≥ x[x.length - 1]

PARAM.name: y
PARAM.content:
h(x) = y[0] for all x < x[1]
        y[1] for x[1] ≤ x < x[2]
        ...
        y[y.length - 1] for x ≥ x[x.length - 1]

THROWS.description: the array of values must be zero-length.
THROWS.name: NoDataException
THROWS.content: if {@code x} or {@code y} are zero-length.

THROWS.description: x[0] is strictly less than x[1].
THROWS.name: NonMonotonicSequenceException
THROWS.content: if the {@code x} array is not sorted in strictly increasing order.

THROWS.description: x and y must have the same length.
THROWS.name: DimensionMismatchException
THROWS.content: if {@code x} and {@code y} do not have the same length.

THROWS.description: x or y must be null.
THROWS.name: NullArgumentException
THROWS.content: if {@code x} or {@code y} are {@code null}.
